worst_lines: line 24: 'target.com' is the wrong merchant domain on a Home Depot receipt
line 34: 'target.com' wrong domain repeated in footer
line 8: stray '4024.97' token and price not aligned to column
line 18: 'THISRECEIPT(PO)NUMBER' words fused with no spaces

thermal.hybrid_issues: font is crisper/cleaner than the real thermal dot-matrix print; multiple compound labels render with no inter-word spaces and one promo URL is the wrong merchant (target.com); price column alignment slips on item line 8
thermal.glyph_issues: no separate glyph atlas panel was provided in this render set, so glyph-variant garbling could not be assessed
thermal.vs_original: both still miss the uneven thermal ink density, slight baseline wander, and the faded/blown-out character edges of a real Home Depot thermal print — the synthetic looks too uniform and digitally sharp

summary: Layout and totals are plausible and largely legible, but a wrong-merchant 'target.com' URL (twice), a garbled item price token, and several space-less compound footer labels plus over-crisp font keep it from passing as a real Home Depot thermal receipt.
